title: During a peaceful protest at the International Mining and Resources Conference, Victoria Police brutally attacked protesters with chemical foam and pepper spray. One protester, a climber, was drenc...
location: International Mining and Resources Conference (IMARC), Melbourne
description: During a peaceful protest at the International Mining and Resources Conference, Victoria Police brutally attacked protesters with chemical foam and pepper spray. One protester, a climber, was drenched in chemical foam by police in a retaliatory attack, causing burns. The police actions were seen as excessive and targeted towards the protesters.

description: A 40-year-old radiologist, Denise Jane Lee, bombarded her ex-boyfriend's new partner with 9000 insulting and threatening messages on Tinder and iMessages. She also launched a malicious campaign against the new partner, spreading defamatory information to 127 people. Lee was convicted of sexual harassment and faced imprisonment.

title: Two gay Saudi journalists sought asylum in Australia after facing threats and persecution in Saudi Arabia. They were detained upon arrival and felt distressed and surprised by the treatment, includ...
description: Two gay Saudi journalists sought asylum in Australia after facing threats and persecution in Saudi Arabia. They were detained upon arrival and felt distressed and surprised by the treatment, including threats of violence by immigration detention facility guards.

title: A Chinese Australian supermarket owner in Wagga Wagga, NSW, was fined over $10,000 for discrimination after attempting to dismiss an Australian local employee and replace her with an Asian employee...
description: A Chinese Australian supermarket owner in Wagga Wagga, NSW, was fined over $10,000 for discrimination after attempting to dismiss an Australian local employee and replace her with an Asian employee. The employee filed a complaint citing discrimination, leading to a ruling by the Fair Work Commission.
